name: apple-passwords
title: Apple Passwords
description: Uses a bridge to conenct to your apple passwords vault locally and quickly search for passwords and otp codes. Everything is kept locally.
author: Alec-bb

commands.name: apw
commands.title: apw
commands.subtitle: Apple Password Search
commands.description: Seach passwords and otp from your apple vault

scripts.test:
node --import tsx --test $(find src/test -name '*.test.ts' -type f | sort | tr '
' ' ')
scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
